title: Automatically assign item for mirror-column
excerpt: Hi, I have created a Mirror Column in a board (A) which is connected to another board (B). When I create an item in board (A) the same item is also created in board (B) via the “When item is created then create item in b…

posts.author: t0nno (Christian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I have created a Mirror Column in a board (A) which is connected to another board (B). When I create an item in board (A) the same item is also created in board (B) via the “When item is created then create item in board and connect board…”.
The problem is that the new item which is created in both boards doesn’t automatically get selected in the mirror-column for board (A). I have to manually choose which item should be connected in the other board for the new item. Is there a way to create a new item and automatically connect the mirror-column to the item in the other board?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @t0nno- Within your automation do you have it set to make the connection on both boards?

image727×488 36.2 KB

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: t0nno (Christian)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your help, it’s working now. I think this feature is really confusing and needs more guidance for the user inside monday.com though.
